# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# Upstream services
services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-service.com
    port: 80

  - name: products-service
    host: products-service.com
    port: 80

# Routes
routes:
  - name: users-route
    paths:
      - /users
    service: users-service

  - name: products-route
    paths:
      - /products
    service: products-service

# Plugins
plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      limit: 100
      burst: 10

# Consumer
consumers:
  - username: api-client
    key: secret-key

# Access control
acls:
  - username: api-client
    groups:
      - admins
